title: Quantum Link: AOL before it was AOL
content:
I used AOL before it was AOL. And if you had a Commodore and a modem in the 1980s, you may have too. On May 24, 1985, Control Video reorganized and became Quantumlink, or Q-Link for short, on its way

The post Quantum Link: AOL before it was AOL appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
